column1: # Sweep 21 — Best-stack validation at 500 steps for real quant_bpb (2026-04-20)
# Takes top knob settings from sweep_19 + sweep_20 and validates at 500 steps for quant_bpb.
# 500 steps × 32K tokens / 39K tok/s = ~410s train + ~10 min eval/quant = ~16 min/run.
# Each run tests one change on top of locked base to isolate effect at scale:
#   baseline_500:       just locked config at 500 steps (reference)
#   combo_all_three:    all three stacked (ultimate stack, slow)
# Expected wall: 800-1500s per run (TTT_LR=0.001 runs ~3× slower)
